description: Known AI-dev tools and artifacts the ai-dev-setup skill can propose. This is a curated starting list, not an exhaustive registry. Entries should be reviewed before use — verify sources/URLs exist before recommending, per skill-discovery.md guidance.

agents_md.purpose: Shared agent-agnostic project rules (Claude, Copilot, Codex, Cursor, etc.)

claude_md.purpose: Claude Code project instructions; should point to AGENTS.md for shared rules

spec_kit.notes: Pairs naturally with a project constitution and AGENTS.md. Check for existing .specify/ before installing.

serena.purpose: Semantic code navigation and editing (symbols, references, edits)
serena.compatibility_notes: Preferred over raw file reads once the repo has real code. Works well with RTK.

github_remote.compatibility_notes: OAuth for Claude Code / VS Code / Copilot. Codex typically needs a bearer via GITHUB_PAT_TOKEN env.

filesystem.purpose: Scoped filesystem access outside the repo root
filesystem.defer_unless: A specific workflow needs it; otherwise the agent's built-in file tools are enough.

puppeteer_or_playwright.defer_unless: The project has a frontend under test.

rtk.verify: rtk gain (distinguishes from Rust Type Kit collision)
rtk.purpose: Compress noisy shell command output before it reaches the agent (60–90% typical savings)
rtk.integration: Document in AGENTS.md / copilot-instructions as 'prefix shell commands with rtk'.

serena_mcp.purpose: Serena as a token-optimization strategy: narrow, symbol-level context instead of whole-file reads

caveman.notes: Evaluate against RTK; typically pick one.

serena_slim.purpose: Lighter-weight Serena variant for smaller projects
serena_slim.notes: Consider if full Serena feels heavy for a small repo.

wshobson_agents.notes: Community skills including many Python-focused ones

skills_sh.notes: Primary public skill discovery index. Consult during Phase 3 when skills are in-scope.
